title: XustomTeams
body:
a very awesome teams mod (wow)

COMMANDS:
 /teamx join <name> (joins team)
 
 /teamx leave (leaves team, if owner leaves disbands the team, 
 but it needs confirmation)
 
 /teamx color <color> (changes team color, owner only)
 
 /teamx list (lists all teams)
 
 /teamx ally <team> (sends a ally request)
 
 /teamx neutral <team> (removes from ally)
 
 /teamx deny (denys ally request)
 
 /teamx relations (shows all relations of the current team)
 
 /teamx setowner <username> (makes player owner, has to be online, needs confirmation and owner only)
 
 /teamx home (teleports to team home)
 
 /teamx home set (sets home at current coordinates, owner only)
 
 /teamx teamchat (lets you talk to your team.)
 
 /teamx allychat (lets you talk to your allys)
 
 /teamx settings (brings up a settings gui to change stuff)
 

every team by default is set to neutral
